name: Cataclysm Turn
fracturedMods: 102% of Hit Damage from you and your Minions cannot be Reflected

explicitMods: 54% increased Critical Strike Chance during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Maelström Span
explicitMods: 16% chance to gain Onslaught for 4 seconds on Kill

socketedItems.secDescrText: While this skill is active, supported spells will be repeatedly triggered.
explicitMods: Each Supported Spell will Trigger when its Cooldown is over

explicitMods: Supported Skills have 1% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate
Supported Spells are Triggered when their Cooldowns are over
hybrid.secDescrText: Supports spell skills that are instant and have no reservation. Cannot support Vaal skills or skills used by totems, traps or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Applies a buff which can take some of the damage from hits for you before being depleted. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
explicitMods: This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect

70% of Damage from Hits is taken from the Buff before Life or Energy Shield
Buff can take 2403 Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Spell, Movement, Duration, Fire, Travel, Blink

socketedItems.secDescrText: Teleport to a location, damaging enemies and leaving a trail of burning ground. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills.
explicitMods: Deals 19.7 Base Fire Damage per second
Modifiers to Spell Damage apply to this Skill's Damage Over Time effect
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.name: Enthralling Oculus
explicitMods: 7% chance to gain Phasing for 4 seconds on Kill
6% chance to Hinder Enemies on Hit with Spells
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an Abyssal Socket on an Item or into an allocated Jewel Socket on the Passive Skill Tree. Right click to remove from the Socket.

name: The Golden Charlatan
enchantMods: Quality does not increase Physical Damage
Grants 1% increased Area of Effect per 4% Quality
explicitMods: Critical Strikes with this Weapon do not deal extra Damage
Gain a random Shrine Buff for 30 seconds when you Kill a Rare or Unique Enemy
flavourText: "He speaks, he leads, he stands tall...
yet, what has he truly done, save
spill our blood in pursuit of power?"

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will raise the level of supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.
explicitMods: +4 to Level of Supported Skill Gems
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Applies a buff that protects the lower half of your life, preventing some of the immediate life loss when damaged by hits and applying the loss over time instead. Your life cannot be raised above low life other than by flasks, and while above low life, skills will cost life as well as mana.
explicitMods:
Life Recovery other than Flasks cannot Recover Life to above Low Life
When taking Damage from Hits, 40% of Life loss below half Life is Prevented, then 75% of Life loss prevented this way is lost over 4 seconds
Skills gain a Base Life Cost equal to 40% of Base Mana Cost while not on Low Life
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports skills which create Minions.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 20% increased Minion maximum Life
Supported Skills have 50% more Minion maximum Life
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports skills that create minions which can be damaged. Cannot support triggered skills.
explicitMods:
Minions from Supported Skills take 15% of Hit Damage from their Life before
you if they are your only Minion
Supported Skills have 20% increased Minion maximum Life
Minions from Supported Skills have 70% more maximum Life if they are your only Minion
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: The Black Sekhema was a formidable fighter
alongside her dekhara, but she was unstoppable
when she fought atop her trusted mount, Shiyo.

socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: "Although we are two bodies, we are of one mind, one heart, drifting
through the cosmos, in search of purpose. The moment we cross paths,
both fleeting and eternal, our eyes are opened to our potential."

socketedItems.secDescrText: Raises a spectral version of a defeated foe as a minion to fight for you in battle.
explicitMods: Minions have +50% to all Elemental Resistances
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Headhunter
explicitMods: 29% increased Damage with Hits against Rare monsters
When you Kill a Rare monster, you gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds
flavourText: "A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

name: Cinderswallow Urn
explicitMods: Recharges 5 Charges when you Consume an Ignited corpse
Enemies Ignited by you during Effect have Malediction
Enemies Ignited by you during Effect take 10% increased Damage
Recover 3% of Energy Shield when you Kill an Enemy during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: A controlled burn is sometimes necessary for new life.

name: Oriath's End
explicitMods: Enemies you Kill during Effect have a 28% chance to Explode, dealing a tenth of their maximum Life as Damage of a Random Element
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: Ennui prevailed, until inspiration sparked
a mote of flame, kindled by fury
and all in his path were obliterated.

typeLine: Alchemist's Diamond Flask of the Cheetah
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: The Gull
explicitMods: Trigger Level 1 Create Lesser Shrine when you Kill an Enemy
91% increased Effect of Shrine Buffs on you
53% increased Duration of Shrine Effects on you
flavourText: "It is the Gull that delivers Man unto Ancestor.
The consumer of our flesh. The seeder of our
souls unto the earth. We give the Gull his life.
The Gull gives us our Way."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

a sinister shaft surreptitiously shot slays a scoundrel.
I will see them again, but not until my work is done.

flavourText: "True power grows with patience. You must nurture it.
You learn what it needs. You provide. You wait. Only
then, when it is ripe, does it yield its fruits."

a better world... but building requires sacrifice, and the useless
would be crushed into the foundation of her new utopia.

Feasting and drinking of the milk of the mother,
they fought to the death for every last drop.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Buffs you, and affects nearby enemies with an aura, differently depending on your stance. Both stances are more impactful against enemies closer to you. Using the skill again alternates between Blood Stance and Sand Stance.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff providing fire damage based on your physical damage. While you have this buff, if you kill an enemy, other enemies near them will be burned based on the overkill damage. The burn inflicted by this skill can only be affected by modifiers to damage over time (burning damage is damage over time).
explicitMods: Base Burning Damage is 30% of Overkill Damage
Buff grants 21% of your Physical Damage as Extra Fire Damage
